prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Find the branch starting with `m4/` (run `git branch -a | grep 'm4/'`). There ma

risks_fired.evidence: Prompt chains 5+ distinct sub-steps (find branch, disambiguate multi-result, pick correct branch, spin worktree, cp CLAUDE.local.md, cp .claude/memory/, report) with no in-fence `No preamble` suppressor as the last line and no body primer immediately after the closing fence naming the preamble + skim-past cue. Rule 17 structural trigger fires: 4+ named sub-steps require one of (a) in-fence suppressor or (b) immediate post-fence body primer. The post-fence body callout ('The grep may hit multiple branches…') re-explains disambiguation to the student but does not name or mitigate preamble behavior.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add a body primer immediately after the closing fence: 'Claude will narrate before acting; skip past the opening and look for the shell command output confirming the worktree path and which files copied across.' No prompt edit required — body prose is not gated by the prompt-approval gate.

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Re-run the task we just packaged. The reference, plan.md, and verifier are at th

risks_fired.evidence: 'Before you start, ask for or write anything else you want for this run.' is a designed self-augment invitation per the minimal hand-off pattern (check_prompts.md rule 19); the pre-action exchange is the design intent. Downgraded to low — accepted preamble shape.
risks_fired.fix_hint: No action needed; self-augment invitation is the pedagogical intent. Low-risk residual: if Claude's augmentation turn runs very long, body callout could cap it ('if Claude asks more than two questions before starting, tell it to pick the most important one and begin').

risks_fired.evidence: In-fence three-list format with explicit anti-softening constraints ('no narrative, no hedging'; 'did NOT ship — each item, no partial / mostly / in progress'; 'verifier — last output line of each run, pasted verbatim') structurally enforces candor. Body callout after fence names RLHF softening risk and gives student a recovery move. Body-callout mitigation carve-out applies.

Verbatim verifier paste requirement forces literal artifact evidence rather than Claude's summary. Binary shipped/did-NOT-ship split with no-qualification language prevents grade inflation. Body callout names inflation risk and gives push-back move. Evidence-backed Debrief carve-out applies.
